name: Windows utilities · System tray tools (multi_scripts_lib/work)
description: System tray oriented scripts/utilities under multi_scripts_lib/work/system tray for lightweight always-on Windows helpers.
longDescription: Lightweight utilities under `multi_scripts_lib/work/system tray` for background tasks reachable from the Windows system tray without a full application window.
highlights: Always-available helpers from the system tray
challenges: Tray apps must fail gracefully when permissions or session state changes.
solutions: Document startup requirements and handle missing tray APIs defensively in code.
security: Tray apps are high-visibility targets—sign binaries and minimise privileges
